sentences.arabic: الْحُصُولُ عَلَى نَوْمٍ كَافٍ ضَرُورِيٌّ لِلصِّحَّةِ النَّفْسِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Dovoljno sna je neophodno za mentalno zdravlje.
sentences.translationEn: Getting enough sleep is essential for mental health.

sentences.arabic: يُسَاعِدُ النَّوْمُ الْعَمِيقُ الدِّمَاغَ عَلَى الرَّاحَةِ بَعْدَ يَوْمٍ طَوِيلٍ مِنَ الْعَمَلِ.
sentences.translation: Dubok san pomaže mozgu da se odmori nakon dugog radnog dana.
sentences.translationEn: Deep sleep helps the brain rest after a long day of work.

sentences.arabic: يَنْصَحُ الْأَطِبَّاءُ بِالنَّوْمِ لِمُدَّةِ سَبْعِ سَاعَاتٍ عَلَى الْأَقَلِّ كُلَّ لَيْلَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Ljekari preporučuju spavanje od najmanje sedam sati svake noći.
sentences.translationEn: Doctors recommend sleeping for at least seven hours every night.
